Interface Time

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

An object that represents a date and time value.

[Guid("66810D21-8DE0-44EE-B26E-465AC09F161F")]
public interface Time : ITime
